case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. LUCIANA GONCALVES VIEIRA DA SILVA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-31-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-23-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT LUCIANA GONCALVES VIEIRA DA SILVA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVIE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY ANGEL GARCIA, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LUCIANA GONCALVES VIERA DA SILVA IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
